typecheck.details: no issues found in 18 source files

lint.command: cd quant-dashboard && python3 -m ruff check src/
lint.details: All checks passed (after auto-fixing 9 W293 whitespace-in-blank-line errors and manually fixing 3 more in src/i18n.py docstring)

blockingIssues.description: English UI is completely broken. The t() function in src/i18n.py returns raw machine-readable keys (e.g., 'sidebar_title', 'total_return', 'run_backtest') instead of human-readable English text when lang='en'. All ~40 t() calls in streamlit_app.py display ugly identifier strings in English mode. Fix: either (a) restructure TRANSLATIONS to use English text as keys (e.g., TRANSLATIONS['Total Return'] = '总收益率') so t('Total Return', 'en') naturally returns 'Total Return', or (b) add an ENGLISH dict mapping keys to English display text and look up both languages. The existing test test_english_returns_key validates the broken behavior by asserting t('total_return', 'en') == 'total_return'.

appliedUpdates.description: Added quantstats-i18n.md documenting that QuantStats generates most metric labels dynamically in Python (reports.py), not from the HTML template, requiring a two-pronged i18n approach: custom template for static HTML strings + post-processing function for dynamic labels.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update port reference from 8501 to 8020 to match services.yaml. Change 'Port Range: 8501 (Streamlit default)' to 'Port Range: 8020 (Streamlit, see services.yaml)'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two independent reviewers (fix-date-range-and-stock-names, i18n-streamlit-ui) flagged the mismatch. AGENTS.md says port 8501, services.yaml declares port 8020. Workers correctly used 8020 from services.yaml.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update baseline test count from '133 existing tests' to '201 tests' (current count) in Testing & Validation Guidance section.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md says '133 existing tests must always pass' but the actual count is now 201 after three milestones of feature work.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add i18n key naming convention to the i18n section: 'Translation keys should be human-readable English text (e.g., "Total Return", not "total_return") so the t() function can return the key itself for English mode.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The i18n-streamlit-ui feature used machine-readable identifiers as keys, causing the English UI to display raw keys instead of readable labels. This was the root cause of the blocking issue.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Backend-worker skill should include a visual UI verification step for Streamlit features: 'For Streamlit UI features, verify the visual output using agent-browser or manual inspection, not just health-check and tests.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The i18n-streamlit-ui worker passed all tests and health checks but didn't visually verify the English UI, missing the broken English labels. A browser-based check would have caught this.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md i18n section already documents the pattern correctly, no new conventions introduced (from i18n-quantstats-chinese-template review).
